app.connectionErrorHint: Make sure spacetime start --in-memory is running on port 3000

register.restoreDesc: Enter a 6-character transfer code or your 12-character permanent recovery key.
register.restoreError: Code not found — check the code or generate a new one on your other device
register.footer: Problems are weighted by community difficulty · powered by SpaceTimeDB

lobby.recoveryNag: You have a class with students — email yourself your recovery key so you don't lose access.
lobby.masteryDesc: Your 1×1 table at a glance — tap any product to see how to think it through.

onboarding.card1Body: Solve as many multiplication problems as you can before time runs out!
onboarding.card2Body: Easy = 1 pt · Medium = 2 pts · Hard = 3 pts. Tougher problems score more!
onboarding.card3Body: Start your first 60-second multiplication sprint. Answer as many as you can — your score gets recorded!

results.heading: Session Complete!
results.struggledHint: These will appear more often in your next sprint.
results.masteryDesc: Your cumulative knowledge map across all sessions.

classroom.joinHint: Students scan the QR code or type the code in the lobby.
classroom.showStatsTitle: Your stats are hidden from this class. Click to show.
classroom.hideStatsTitle: Hide your stats from this class.
classroom.hiddenHint: Your stats are hidden from this class's leaderboard and mastery grid.
classroom.leaderboardEmpty: Start sprinting to populate the board!
classroom.liveCaption: Best session score · Live via SpaceTimeDB
classroom.closeHint: Closing the class removes all members from the session.
classroom.studentLoginHint: Scan to log in on any device — no password needed.

account.recoveryDesc: Use these to access your account from another device or browser.
account.recoveryKeyDesc: Permanent 12-character key · never expires · store in a password manager.
account.emailKeyDesc: Email your recovery key to yourself so you can restore access on any device.
account.emailKeySent: Recovery key sent — check your inbox.
account.logoutDesc: Logging out removes this device's access. Your scores and username are kept on the server — use a transfer code first if you want to sign in again later.
account.deleteDesc: Permanently deletes all your scores, sessions, and answers. This cannot be undone.

leaderboard.title: 🏆 Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: No sessions yet — be the first!
leaderboard.footer: Score = Σ difficulty weight of correct answers · Updates live via SpaceTimeDB

unlock.tier1Desc: New problems with 11, 12, 15, 20, 25 are now in your sprint!

classes.emptyHint: Join an existing class or create your own.

extendedTables.title: Extended Tables
extendedTables.desc: Practice ×11–×25 multiplication — available to Master-level players.

scoring.title: Scoring Guide
scoring.howTitle: Points per correct answer = difficulty weight
scoring.howBody: Weights start from research estimates and gradually shift toward community data over 200+ answers per problem:
scoring.digitBonus: Bonus for extended tables: 11× and 12× answers add +0.5 pts. Three-digit results (≥ 100, e.g. 12×9=108) add +1.0 pts.
scoring.calibNote: Research basis: squares (7×7, 8×8) are harder than they look — students confuse them with neighbours. ×4 and ×9 have reliable tricks (double-twice, digit-sum). Bootstrap values inspired by Ashcraft & Christy (1995).

classSprint.alertTitle: Your teacher started a class sprint!
classSprint.gridDesc: Cells answered correctly by at least one member this sprint.
classSprint.noResults: No results yet — sessions still running.

tierPicker.cardBody: Choose where you want to begin — you can always adjust later.
tierPicker.adjustBody: Practice easier tables or jump ahead.

tiers.unlockedDesc1: The 3s table is open. Practice 3×1 through 3×10.
tiers.unlockedDesc2: Fives are easy — they always end in 0 or 5.
tiers.unlockedDesc4: Think of 6 as 5+1 — you're over halfway!
tiers.unlockedDesc5: The 7s — the toughest table. Nearly there!
tiers.unlockedDesc7: You know every multiplication from 1 to 10. 🏆
